main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/1.05|1.05]] |gameversion=1.05 |date=May 22, 2024 |summary='''Akuma Release'''. Balance changes for all characters. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/en/battle_change/202405 Patch Notes] }} == Akuma Patch == * Akuma released
== '''Universal Changes''' == * Damage Scaling on grounded light normals increased 10% → 20% * Back Throw oki has generally been weakened when throwing opponent into the corner * Drive Reversal on block {{sf6-adv|VM|-8}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} and can no longer be low-profiled ** Can now be input on wakeup by holding {{clr|H|6HPHK}}; this version is 2f faster (18f) and has no screen freeze * Drive Parry: ** Throw hurtbox expanded; strike/projectile hurtbox expanded from frame 3~ ** Minimum parry time increased by 8f total (extra 4f active + 4f recovery) ** After a successful parry, Drive gauge starts to regenerate after 20f instead of 60f * Perfect Parry now inflicts scaling to meter gain and Drive damage for the entire punish combo ** 20% scaling on Super gauge build for both characters ** 50% scaling on defender's Drive damage and on attacker's Drive gain * Can no longer override the damage scaling of a {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} Stun performed at the max distance from corner (bug fix) * 1st startup frame of {{clr|SA|SA1}} is now strike/throw invuln instead of full invuln for all characters that have invincibility
== '''Key Character Changes''' == === '''A.K.I.''' === * {{clr|L|5LK}} startup 5f → 4f, recovery 11 → 12, Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|M|5MK}} startup 9f → 8f, less pushback on hit * {{clr|M|2MP}} whiff recovery reduced by 3f (now the same as on hit/block) * {{clr|M|2MK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}}, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} ** Now a much stronger combo/pressure tool out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|H|5HP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} and Target Combo hitconfirm window 19f → 20f * {{clr|H|5HK}} reduced hurtbox and better anti-air invincibility while active * {{clr|H|2HK}} active frames 5 → 6, recover 21 → 20, reduced horizontal hurtbox, and more consistent juggle state out of {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} * {{clr|L|Hun Dun}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LP}}) Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} (extra hitstun allows a {{clr|M|5MP}} link when {{clr|DR|DR}} canceled)

* {{clr|L|LP Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|L|236LP}}) more range, less pushback on Toxic Blossom hit, and crumples on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} ** Allows a much stronger midscreen juggle on a Toxic Blossom {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} crumple * {{clr|H|HP Serpent Lash}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) head hurtbox reduced on frame 4 (was frame 6) * {{clr|L|Nightshade Pulse}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) can now be canceled into {{clr|OD|236KK}} until the end of recovery * {{clr|OD|OD Nightshade Chaser}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}~{{clr|OD|6P}}) now causes a knockdown on hit (was {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} vs. grounded opponent) * {{clr|H|Toxic Wreath}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) damage distribution changed: 400,400 → 200,600 (improves juggles where only 2nd hit connects) ** 2nd hit active frames 7 → 9 (can now be up to {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} on block) * 214K can now be canceled to {{clr|SA|SA3}} after landing; {{clr|H|HK}} version has more pushback (safer on block, worse Burnout pressure) ** {{clr|OD|OD Cruel Fate}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) can also be canceled on the non-cinematic version * Venomous Fang (2PP~P) projectile invincibility extended until end of active frames * Heel Strike (2PP~K) hitbox expanded and works more consistently in combos * Entrapment (2PP~{{clr|L|LPLK}}) removed 20% immediate scaling * {{clr|L|LK Snake Step}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) now moves backwards instead of returning to original position

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} hitbox expanded * {{clr|SA|SA2}} damage on final attack 800 → 1000
=== '''Blanka''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} * {{clr|M|5MP}} reduced hurtbox while active * {{clr|M|2MP}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|M|2MK}} whiff/block recovery 16 → 18; 2f extra blockstun (same Block Advantage, but affects all cancel data); extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|M|Rock Crusher}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-2}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} (weaker block mixup after {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}})

* Wild Lift (2PP~P) hitbox expanded forward * {{clr|M|MP Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|M|[4]6MP}}) hitbox expanded during combos (combos more consistently from canceled light normals) * {{clr|OD|OD Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}) landing recovery on block shifted 4f earlier (1f land → 5f land), making Perfect Parry punishes more consistent ** Also applies to all {{clr|SA|SA2}} enhanced Rolling Attacks * {{clr|OD|OD Backstep Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|OD|63214KK}}) 1st attack hitbox expanded forward * {{clr|OD|OD Aerial Rolling Attack}} ({{clr|OD|j.[4]6PP}}) landing recovery 10 → 15, can now be minus on block on close range connect * Blanka-chan Bomb (22P) starter scaling 20% added; also counts as 2 hits when comboed into (scaling only applies once per combo)
=== '''Cammy''' === * Forward Throw: slightly more pushback on hit (still allows throw loops)

* {{clr|M|5MP}} reduced pushback * {{clr|H|5HK}} on block {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} and reduced pushback * {{clr|H|Swing Combination}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) 2f easier to hitconfirm; 2nd hit of {{clr|H|HK}} now cancelable ** Damage distribution on {{clr|H|HK}} changed 200,600 → 400,400 ** Damage scaling changed from Combo (5% Extra) → Combo (2 hits), and both hits of {{clr|H|HK}} apply separate damage scaling

* Quick Spin Knuckle (214{{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}/{{clr|OD|PP}}) projectile invuln now starts later, 6f → 9f (meterless) / 3f → 9f ({{clr|OD|OD}}) ** Significantly harder to use on reaction to projectiles * {{clr|H|HP Hooligan Combination}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) collision box changed; can no longer juggle Divekick after escaping corner with {{clr|M|4MP}}~{{clr|H|HK}} > {{clr|H|236HP}} * {{clr|OD|OD Fatal Leg Twister}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}~{{clr|L|LPLK}}) starter scaling 20% → 30% ** Juggle directly into {{clr|SA|SA3}} is often stronger than an extended combo after the throw * Cannon Strike (j.214K) hurtbox changed ** Early frames are more vulnerable to projectiles, later frames are less vulnerable to low attacks

* {{clr|SA|SA2}} cinematic damage increased 2800 → 3000; input changed from {{clr|SA|214214K}} → {{clr|SA|214214P}}
=== '''Chun-Li''' === * Back Walk Speed reduced 0.037 → 0.035

* {{clr|L|5LP}} lower-body hurtbox expanded on frames 9-13 * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} with more pushback; reduced hurtbox on arm and around head/feet * {{clr|H|5HK}} starter scaling 20% added (weaker when used as anti-air juggle starter) * {{clr|M|Swift Thrust}} ({{clr|M|4/6MP}}) hitconfirm window 17f → 15f, {{clr|DR|Drive Rush cancel}} occurs 2f earlier (allowing combo to {{clr|H|4HP}})

* {{clr|OD|OD Kikoken}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}) starter scaling 20% added * Hazanshu (214K) projectile invuln shifted 1f later on all versions (6f → 7f) * Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks (j.236K) hurtbox expanded downward, landing recovery on whiff increased 15 → 18 * {{clr|OD|OD Aerial Hundred Lightning Kicks}} ({{clr|OD|j.236KK}}) damage 1300 → 1600, landing recovery reduced 15 → 5, KD advantage increased by 7f

* {{clr|SA|Air SA1}} final hit damage 600 → 800 * {{clr|SA|SA2}} now scales Super Art meter gain by 30% for all hits until the combo ends
=== '''Dee Jay''' === * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HP}} starter scaling 20% added * {{clr|H|2HK}} has more consistent juggle state after anti-air {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} * {{clr|H|Face Breaker}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) 1st hit juggles opponent much lower (requires 2-hit version for most follow-up juggles, which uses up more juggle potential) * {{clr|L|Knee Shot}} ({{clr|L|j.2LK}}) reduced vertical hitbox; now in a {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} state until landing (more risky vs. specific anti-air normals) * {{clr|M|Threebeat Combo}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|M|MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}

* {{clr|OD|OD Air Slasher}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}) starter scaling 20% added; more juggle potential on 2nd hit * Jackknife Maximum ([2]8{{clr|M|MK}}/{{clr|H|HK}}/{{clr|OD|KK}}) airborne 1f later (4f → 5f); reduced forward hitbox vs. grounded opponents (weaker as a punish) * {{clr|H|Double Rolling Sobat}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) improved juggle limit * {{clr|OD|OD Double Rolling Sobat}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) improved juggle limit and less likely to whiff under opponent * {{clr|L|Funky Slicer}} ({{clr|L|214K~LK}}) starter scaling 20% added; 3f extra recovery on whiff or vs. armor; more susceptible to low-crush attacks * {{clr|H|Maximum Strike}} ({{clr|H|214K~HK}}) anti-air invuln now applies to body on frames 15-19 * {{clr|OD|OD Maximum Strike}} ({{clr|OD|214KK~HK}}) now counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} damage 1800 → 2000, recovery 45 → 33, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-24}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}} with more pushback * {{clr|SA|SA2}} now scales Super Art meter gain by 30% for all hits until the combo ends
=== '''Dhalsim''' === * {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} KD advantage +23 → +24, now knocks down on 1st hit

* {{clr|M|2MK}} reduced pushback on hit, causes different reeling animation on hit when {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} or better * {{clr|H|5HK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}, pushback reduced (more consistent {{clr|DR|Drive Rush cancel}} follow-ups) * {{clr|L|j.2LP}} increased juggle potential, now causes knockdown vs. airborne opponents

* Held Yoga Fire (236[P]) startup 45 → 43, recovery 32 → 30 (total animation 4f shorter; also improves KD advantage by 2f) * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Blast}} ({{clr|OD|63214KK}}) removed the 20% starter scaling; reduced Juggle Increase value when comboing against airborne opponents * {{clr|OD|OD Yoga Comet}} ({{clr|OD|j.236PP}}) projectile no longer disappears before hitting the ground

* {{clr|SA|SA2}} now does more chip damage vs. opponent in Burnout when charged to a higher level (750/850/950) * {{clr|SA|SA3}} startup 9f → 2f when canceled from Yoga Flame (for combo consistency)
=== '''Ed''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|M|2MP}} now extends hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery
=== '''E. Honda''' === * {{clr|L|2LK}} now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P (only combos into {{clr|L|LP}} version) * {{clr|M|5MP}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} and more forward movement (now a much stronger option out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}}) * {{clr|M|5MK}} foot hurtbox severely reduced (excellent vs. low pokes); now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P * {{clr|M|2MK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} (gives more consistent confirms out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}}); now cancelable into Sumo Spirit enhanced 214P * {{clr|H|5HP}} {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} crumple KD advantage increased by 12f (KD +65 → +77) * {{clr|H|2HK}} 2nd hit puts airborne opponents into higher juggle state, allowing for side-switch {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} juggles * {{clr|M|j.MP}} now puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state * {{clr|H|Toko Shizume}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|3HK}}) kara-cancel occurs 1f earlier (reducing the gap when canceling into Oicho Throw) ** Can now be canceled into Sumo Spirit on hit by inputting {{clr|H|2HK}}; only useful when juggled into (unsafe on grounded hit)

* Enhanced {{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}} Hundred Hand Slap (ss.214{{clr|M|MP}}/{{clr|H|HP}}) leaves opponents closer on hit (grounded or airborne connect) * {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} Sumo Headbutt ([4]6{{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}}) first hit damage 1300 → 1400; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Pushback on block reduced; extra pushback when opponent is in Burnout ** 4th active frame has an extended hurtbox that applies when opponent is in a combo (improving consistency from ranged cancels) * {{clr|H|HP Sumo Headbutt}} ({{clr|H|[4]6HP}}) first hit damage 1400 → 1500; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Pushback on block reduced; no change to pushback when opponent is in Burnout ** Honda will now start landing recovery after 15 active frames when switching sides with opponent (no longer flies far under neutral jumps) * Sumo Smash ([2]8K) downward hit is now a Hard Knockdown; pushback on block increased (no longer in range for {{clr|L|2LP}} frame trap or Oicho Throw) ** Drive Damage on block for downward hit increased 8000 → 10000 * {{clr|OD|OD Sumo Smash}} ({{clr|OD|[2]8KK}}) downward hit is now a Hard Knockdown; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} ** Can now hold {{clr|M|MK}} to extend airborne time by 2f, or {{clr|L|LK}} to extend by 4f (useful to disrupt Perfect Parry timing) * {{clr|OD|OD Teppo Triple Slap 1}} ({{clr|OD|236KK~P}}) now keeps opponents standing on grounded hit ({{sf6-adv|P|+3}})

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} hitbox expanded downwards
=== '''Guile''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} 3f extra recovery on whiff (13 → 16), now extends hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HP}} starter scaling 20% added * {{clr|M|j.MK}} damage 500 → 600 * {{clr|H|Reverse Spin Kick}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) knocks down on airborne {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} (KD +30~34) * {{clr|M|Double Shot}} ({{clr|M|2MP}}~{{clr|M|2MP}}) juggles opponent closer to Guile

* Sonic Boom ([4]6P) arm hurtbox appears 2f before active; arm hurtbox expanded upward (easier to punish Sonic Boom with a ranged jump-in that reaches the top corner of Guile) ** Drive Damage on block now different for each version: {{clr|L|LP}} 2500 (unchanged) / {{clr|M|MP}} 4000 / {{clr|H|HP}} 3000 * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Boom}} ({{clr|OD|[4]6PP}}) starter scaling 20% added * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Blade}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) KD advantage +53 → +57, opponent is juggled closer to Guile * Sonic Cross (214P~6P) arm hurtbox appears 1f earlier (2f before active); arm hurtbox expanded upward just like Sonic Boom ** Drive Damage on block now different for each follow-up 6P strength: {{clr|L|LP}} 1500+2000 / {{clr|M|MP}} 3000+2000 / {{clr|H|HP}} 2000+2000 * {{clr|OD|OD Sonic Cross}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}~{{clr|OD|6PP}}) Drive Gauge cost 4 → 3 (only 1 extra bar when performed with immediate {{clr|OD|6PP}} input) ** Opponent's wallsplat lasts 3f longer

* {{clr|SA|SA1 (Straight)}} first 3 active frames changed so that most of the hitbox only hits an opponent mid-combo ** Only the very base of the hitbox hits normally; functionally 11f startup to reach its max range as a punish or anti-fireball tool
=== '''Jamie''' === * Back Throw KD Advantage +38 → +26 ** Combined with universal distance nerf, prevents meterless strike/throw oki

* {{clr|M|5MP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} * {{clr|M|5MK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} (also allows {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} cancel to {{clr|H|214HP}}) * {{clr|M|2MP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}}; Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} (also allows cancel to {{clr|M|214MP}}/{{clr|OD|214PP}}) * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|2HK}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-10}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-11}}; 2nd hit is no longer a low when 1st hit is blocked ** 1st hit does not increase juggle counter when juggled into (more lenient combo routes) * {{clr|M|Falling Star Kick}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) hitconfirm window into DL2+ {{clr|M|MK}} follow-up extended 15f → 17f (+1 hitstop and +1f longer cancel window) * {{clr|H|Hermit's Elbow}} ({{clr|H|4HP}}, DL3+) pushback on hit reduced; {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} now links to {{clr|L|5LK}}, and to {{clr|L|5LP}} from more ranges * {{clr|L|Bitter Strikes 1}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}, DL1+) hitbox expanded, now hits more consistently from farther ranges * {{clr|M|Bitter Strikes 2}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}~{{clr|M|MP}}, DL1+) +2f blockstun and +2f recovery on block (no change to advantage) ** {{clr|DR|Drive Rush cancel}} timing shifted 1f earlier; combined with blockstun change, {{clr|DR|DR cancel}} Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+9}}/{{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+10}}/{{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} * {{clr|H|Ransui Haze Headbutt}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}~{{clr|H|4HK}}~P Close, DL4) startup 17f → 15f; allows combo from {{clr|H|6HK}} without {{clr|PC|Counter-hit}} or {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} ** Damage 700 → 850 (with DL4 scaling: 770 → 935); now counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into

* Freeflow Strikes (236P~6P~6P, DL0-DL3) Drive Damage on block increased 1500 → 2500 on each punch; Drive Gain increased 700 → 1500 on each punch ** DL4 version: hitbox expanded on 1st hit; Drive Gain increased overall 4900 → 5500 and shifted primarily to first attack (3000) * {{clr|OD|OD Freeflow Strikes 1}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}, DL0-DL3) Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}; all followup 6P attacks are no longer subject to combo scaling ** Drive Damage on block increased 1500 → 2500 on all punches of {{clr|OD|236PP~6P~6P}} sequence * {{clr|OD|OD Freeflow Strikes 1}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}, DL4) hitbox expanded on 1st hit; followup 6P attacks are no longer subject to combo scaling * Freeflow Kicks (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~6K~6K) Drive Damage on block increased 1500 → 2500 on each kick; Drive Gain increased 700 → 1000 on each kick (except {{clr|OD|OD}}) * {{clr|H|HP Swagger Step}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}}; recovery 17 → 16; KD Advantage +39 → +42 (safe jump setup) * {{clr|OD|OD Swagger Step}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) KD advantage increased by 3f vs. airborne opponents * {{clr|L|LK Arrow Kick}} ({{clr|L|623LK}}) startup 6f → 5f; starter scaling 30% added; can now juggle into {{clr|OD|623KK}}/{{clr|SA|SA1}}/{{clr|SA|SA3}} on high connect * Luminous Dive Kick (j.214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) pushback on block reduced; hurtbox changed ** Early frames are more vulnerable to projectiles, later frames are less vulnerable to low attacks * Bakkai (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) projectile invuln extended until end of active frames for all versions * Tenshin (63214K) no longer increases juggle counter on grounded opponents * {{clr|OD|OD Tenshin}} ({{clr|OD|63214KK}}) starter scaling 20% → 30%, now applies directly to next hit instead of 3rd combo hit ** 20% immediate scaling removed when comboed into

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} startup 10f → 8f, hitbox expanded for juggle consistency ** No longer moves forward during screen freeze (cannot move through fast projectiles) * {{clr|SA|SA3}}/{{clr|SA|CA}} collision box expanded (less likely to drop in juggles)
=== '''JP''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HK}} increased pushback on block; no longer in throw range even after {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} * {{clr|M|Grom Strelka}} ({{clr|M|4MP}}~{{clr|M|MP}}) counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into

* {{clr|OD|OD Triglav}} ({{clr|OD|22PP}}) starter scaling 20% added * {{clr|H|HP Stribog}} ({{clr|H|236HP}}) 3f extra recovery on 1st hit when Perfect Parried (allows {{clr|DR|DI}} punish) * {{clr|OD|OD Stribog}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) startup 22f → 19f (combos from mediums or {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} lights, true blockstring from heavies) ** Damage 300,500 → 600,400; KD advantage +67(+87) → +56(+72) ** No longer cancelable on 2nd hit, and 1st hit knockback changed to combo into {{clr|SA|SA3}} more consistently ** 3f extra recovery on 1st hit when Perfect Parried (allows {{clr|DR|DI}} punish) * Departure (214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) Spike projectile now increases opponent's juggle count by 1 in some juggle situations ** The initial spike hit is still a free juggle when starting a combo * {{clr|OD|OD Torbalan}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) starter scaling 20% added; 1st hit now {{clr|SA|Super}} cancelable * Embrace (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) can now be comboed into; adds 25% immediate scaling in combos ** Hitbox expanded inward (now harder to bypass with fast moves like {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}})

* {{clr|SA|SA2}} total recovery 8 → 13 and hurtbox expanded (more risky in neutral and worse advantage when canceled into) ** Ghost timings are unchanged relative to the end of recovery * {{clr|SA|SA3}} HKD advantage +44 → +23 and recovers ~3/4 screen away (no change to {{clr|SA|CA}})
=== '''Juri''' === * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|M|j.MP}} damage 700 → 500 ({{clr|SA|SA2}} chained version: 500 → 300) * {{clr|H|Korenzan}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) 2nd hit now puts airborne opponents into limited juggle OTG state * {{clr|H|Death Crest}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|4HP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) final hit is now {{clr|SA|Super}} cancelable ** Now always leaves a 2f blockstring gap between the first 2 hits, while last 2 hits are always a true blockstring

* {{clr|OD|OD Fuhajin}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) startup 16f → 12f, active 4 → 6, recovery 25 → 21; combos from all lights * {{clr|M|Ankensatsu}} ({{clr|M|236MK}}) starter scaling 20% added, and counts as 2 hits of scaling when comboed into ** Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}} with more pushback (can lead to combos even without Fuha stocks) * Shiren-sen (j.214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~K) hitbox expanded for more consistency; Juri lands closer to the opponent for better oki

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} no longer moves forward during screen freeze (cannot move through fast projectiles) * {{clr|SA|SA3}} hurtbox adjusted to match animation; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-31}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-36}}
=== '''Ken''' === * {{clr|H|Chin Buster}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|H|HP}}) cancel window reduced (harder to hitconfirm, can no longer delay to create a frame trap)

* Hadoken (236P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) extended hurtbox reduced * {{clr|OD|OD Hadoken}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}) 20% starter scaling added * {{clr|OD|OD Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) damage 1500 → 1700 and has more juggle potential * {{clr|H|HK Jinrai Kick}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) does 1000 more Drive damage on block ** Also better as an approach tool (more range, better proximity guard, no extended hurtbox until active) * {{clr|M|Gorai Axe Kick}} (236K~{{clr|M|6MK}}) now causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponent and has better KD advantage ** No follow-up juggle possible unless the {{clr|M|6MK}} starts the juggle and cancels into {{clr|SA|SA3}} * Run~Shoryuken (KK~623P) startup 11+9 → 11+8 and 3f better KD advantage

* {{clr|SA|SA2}} damage 2700 → 2800
=== '''Kimberly''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} damage 450 → 500 and pushback reduced; can now link {{clr|M|2MP}}, {{clr|M|2MP}}, {{clr|M|5MP}}

* {{clr|L|LP Vagabond Edge}} ({{clr|L|236LP}}) on block {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} and can be spaced safely at range * Bushin Senpukyaku (214K) anti-air invuln now starts 1f before active on all meterless versions and has a reduced head hurtbox * {{clr|OD|OD Bushin Senpukyaku}} ({{clr|OD|214KK}}) now cancelable into {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} on 4th hit; slight improvement to damage and juggle potential * Arc Step (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}} Close) will no longer activate while holding forward during Sprint * {{clr|OD|OD Nue Twister}} ({{clr|OD|j.236PP}}) juggle limit increased; now combos after {{clr|H|236HP}} or Wallsplat > {{clr|H|2HP}} > {{clr|L|236K~LK}} ** Now counts as 2 hits for damage scaling when comboed into

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} startup decreased 12f → 10f ** Can now choose whether or not to spend Spraycan (by holding K) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} damage 2600 → 2800, hitbox expanded for juggle consistency
=== '''Lily''' === * {{clr|L|5LP}} startup 6f → 5f * {{clr|L|5LK}} recovery 12 → 8, Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+5}}, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} * {{clr|M|2MK}} startup 10f → 9f * {{clr|H|2HP}} extends a hurtbox until end of recovery * {{clr|H|2HK}} 2nd hit can now be stand blocked if the first hit is blocked ** 1st hit now does more hitstun; much safer if the first hit lands as a whiff punish and the 2nd hit whiffs ({{sf6-adv|VM|-15}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}})

* {{clr|M|MP Condor Wind}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}) has less pushback on hit (consistently in command throw range after close range activation) * {{clr|OD|OD Condor Wind}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) startup 21f → 19f

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} startup 13f → 10f * {{clr|SA|SA2}} damage increased by 100 on all versions (ground/air, regular/{{clr|WC|Windclad}}) ** {{clr|SA|Air SA2}} startup reduced to 2f when canceled from {{clr|OD|236KK}} for combo consistency
=== '''Luke''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} range reduced * {{clr|M|5MK}} startup 7 → 8, recovery 20 → 19 * {{clr|M|2MP}} range reduced, starter scaling 15% added * {{clr|M|2MK}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|H|5HP}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}, expanded collision box upward for juggle consistency * {{clr|H|5HK}} active 6 → 7, recovery 17 → 16 (1f better advantage when spaced at max range) ** Camera shake added when blocked at max range (easy to identify when Luke is plus on block) * {{clr|H|2HP}} applies an extra 5% damage scaling to next attack when comboed into ** Anti-air hurtbox shifted forward and reduced downward, upper body hurtbox expanded * {{clr|H|j.HP}} downward hurtbox expanded * {{clr|H|j.HK}} downward hurtbox expanded * {{clr|H|Outlaw Kick}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+19}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+17}} and more pushback ** Much weaker optimal punish routes; no more {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|H|4HK}} into {{clr|DR|DR~}}{{clr|H|4HK}}

* {{clr|OD|Fatal Shot}} ({{clr|OD|236PP~PP}}) damage 700 → 1000, Super Art gain 400 → 1000, {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} Drive damage 2000 → 7000 * {{clr|M|Charged MP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|M|214[MP]}}) recovery vs. armor 27 → 23 on the non-Perfect version ** Attempting {{clr|H|2HP}} > {{clr|M|pf.214[MP]}} is now safe vs. {{clr|DR|Drive Impact}} if combo is dropped * {{clr|H|Charged HP Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|H|214[HP]}}) KD advantage +63 → +64 on both Perfect and non-Perfect versions * {{clr|OD|OD Flash Knuckle}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) KD advantage +52 → +62 * {{clr|OD|DDT}} ({{clr|OD|214PP~PP}}) damage 2000 → 2500, Super Art gain 1500 → 3000 * No Chaser (236K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~P) active 7 → 10, recovery 19 → 16, hitconfirm window ({{clr|SA|SA3}}) increased to 27f on close-range connect

* {{clr|SA|SA3}}/{{clr|SA|CA}} invincibility no longer extends beyond 1-13f from long range (much worse vs. projectiles)
=== '''Manon''' === * {{clr|L|2LP}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} (allows much stronger conversions on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} or after {{clr|DR|DR}}) * {{clr|L|2LK}} less pushback on hit/block * {{clr|M|5MK}} less pushback on hit * {{clr|M|2MP}} extends a hurtbox on whiff until end of recovery * {{clr|M|2MK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} and reduced pushback (allows much stronger conversions after {{clr|DR|DR}}) * {{clr|H|Révérence}} ({{clr|H|4HP}}) Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}, reduced pushback on hit (much stronger meaty tool) * {{clr|H|Tomoe Derrière}} ({{clr|H|3HK}}) increased juggle limit * {{clr|M|En Haut}} ({{clr|M|4MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) less pushback on 1st hit; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents

* {{clr|OD|OD Grand Fouetté}} ({{clr|OD|236PP~K}}) startup 11 → 10 (now combos from {{clr|H|4HP}} for much stronger juggle routes) * {{clr|OD|OD Rond-point}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) 1st hit now cancels to {{clr|SA|SA2}}/{{clr|SA|SA3}}; 1st hit has more range vs. grounded opponents ** Damage distribution: 400,400 → 500,300 (improves damage if 1st hit is canceled; still does 400 damage if only 2nd hit connects)

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} improved hitbox against opponents juggled above Manon * {{clr|SA|SA2}} final hit damage 850 → 950; new hitbox to make 3rd hit juggle more consistently * {{clr|SA|SA3}}/{{clr|SA|CA}} now does more damage at higher Medal levels ** Lv.2 +100, Lv.3 +200, Lv.4 +400, Lv.5 +600
=== '''Marisa''' === * {{clr|M|2MP}} now extends a wider hurtbox on whiff until the end of recovery * {{clr|H|5[HP]}} recovery on hit/block 22 → 21, Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+7}}, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} * {{clr|H|2[HP]}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|H|2[HK]}} recovery on hit/block 32 → 20, KD Advantage +32 → +35, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-6}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|H|Charged Heavy air normals}} landing recovery 6f → 3f (no longer punishable after a low-height Perfect Parry) * {{clr|L|Light Two Hitter}} ({{clr|L|5LP}}~{{clr|L|LP}}) combo scaling reduced 25% → 15% * {{clr|H|Falx Crusher 2}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}~{{clr|H|6HK}}) juggles much higher and allows much more lenient juggle routes when comboed into

* {{clr|OD|OD Gladius}} ({{clr|OD|236PP}}/{{clr|OD|[PP]}}) starter scaling 30% added * Phalanx (623P/{{clr|OD|PP}}) now a HKD on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} ** {{clr|OD|623PP}} Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} * {{clr|OD|OD Quadriga}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) more pushback (much harder to punish on block when spaced) * Scutum (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}) Counter-attack now breaks armor; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * Enfold (214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~{{clr|L|LPLK}}) reduced KD Advantage +20 → +18

* {{clr|SA|SA3}}/{{clr|SA|CA}} reduced KD Advantage +19 → +14; {{clr|SA|CA}} distance from corner now the same as {{clr|SA|SA3}}
=== '''Rashid''' === * Back Throw increased distance after hit; KD advantage reduced +27 → +24

* {{clr|H|Blitz Strike}} ({{clr|H|j.2HP}}) no longer increases juggle counter when comboed into after Arabian Skyhigh (j.214K) * Run (6[6]) now transitions to follow-ups 2f faster (20f → 18f) * Backup (6[6]~P) slide can now hit airborne opponents; 2nd hit is {{clr|SA|Super}} cancelable (on hit only) * Tempest Moon (6[6]~K) hopkick is now {{clr|SA|Super}} cancelable on hit/block

* {{clr|L|LK Eagle Spike}} ({{clr|L|214LK}}, Regular/Enhanced) is cancelable into {{clr|SA|SA3}} on hit only after landing

* {{clr|SA|SA2}} now prevents Rashid from gaining additional {{clr|SA|Super}} meter until active frames end
=== '''Ryu''' === * {{clr|L|5LP}} pushback on hit reduced * {{clr|L|5LK}} pushback on hit/block reduced * {{clr|L|2LP}} pushback on hit reduced * {{clr|M|5MK}} Super Art gain 500 → 700 * {{clr|M|2MP}} active 3 → 4, recovery 14 → 13 (no change to total frame count or hitconfirm window) * {{clr|H|5HP}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+4}} (allows link to {{clr|M|2MK}} after ranged PC/{{clr|DR|DR}} hit) * {{clr|H|2HP}} damage on later active frames is now equal to the first active frame (800) ** Super Art gain 1000 → 1200; Drive Damage 6000 → 7500 on block, 8000 → 10000 on {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} * {{clr|M|j.MP}} hitbox on 2nd hit expanded to match 1st hit * {{clr|M|Collarbone Breaker}} ({{clr|M|6MP}}) Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}}; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} * {{clr|H|Solar Plexus Strike}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) 20% starter scaling removed; Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} ** 10f more hitstun on 1st hit (affects trades and {{clr|PC|Counter-hits}}/whiff punishes where 2nd hit whiffs) * {{clr|H|Axe Kick}} ({{clr|H|4HK}}) 2nd hit now puts airborne opponents into OTG bounce state ** 2nd hit Juggle Increase value: 1,1 → 1,4 (juggles are more strict after OTG bounce) * {{clr|H|Whirlwind Kick}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) increased pushback on block (pushback now also applies to Ryu when opponent is cornered; much easier to space safely) ** Foot hurtbox reduced upward; Low Crush lasts 1f longer (13-19f → 13-20f) * {{clr|L|Fuwa Triple Strike 1}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}) Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-7}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}}; no longer cancels to {{clr|H|HK}} ender on whiff * {{clr|H|Fuwa Triple Strike 2}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|L|LK}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) now cancelable into Denjin Charge by inputting 2P (on hit only; KD Adv. +7) * {{clr|H|High Double Strike}} ({{clr|H|5HP}}~{{clr|H|HK}}) now cancelable into Denjin Charge by inputting 2P (on hit only; KD Adv. +7)

* Hadoken (236P) extended hurtbox reduced, making it much harder to counterpoke; +2f hitstun on all versions ** Hit Advantage: {{clr|L|LP}} {{sf6-adv|M|-1}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}, {{clr|M|MP}} {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-1}}, {{clr|H|HP}} {{sf6-adv|VM|-5}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} * {{clr|H|Denjin Hadoken}} ({{clr|H|D.236HP}}) now only comes out when pressing {{clr|H|HP}}; can use regular {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} versions while retaining Denjin stock * {{clr|H|HP Shoryuken}} ({{clr|H|623HP}}) cancel into {{clr|SA|SA3}} is now guaranteed to get a full cinematic connect (due to 2f startup on {{clr|SA|SA3}}) * Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku (214K) increased juggle limit; increased juggle start/increase value (less lenient afterwards) ** Damage increased on all versions ({{clr|L|LK 800 → 900}}, {{clr|M|MK 900 → 1000}}, {{clr|H|HK 1000 → 1200}}) ** Super Art gain increased on all versions ({{clr|L|LK 1000 → 1200}}, {{clr|M|MK 1000 → 1300}}, {{clr|H|HK 1000 → 1400}}) ** Drive gain increased on all versions ({{clr|L|LK 2000 → 3000}}, {{clr|M|MK 2000 → 3500}}, {{clr|H|HK 2000 → 4000}}) * {{clr|OD|OD Aerial Tatsumaki Senpu-kyaku}} ({{clr|OD|j.214KK}}) collision box and juggle-only hitbox expanded to make juggles more consistent ** Last hit has higher juggle potential and will hit much more consistently

* {{clr|L|LK High Blade Kick}} ({{clr|L|236LK}}) startup 15f → 14f; active 9 → 6 (total move length 45f → 41f, now combos from {{clr|L|2LP}}) ** Damage 1000 → 1100; KD advantage increased +35 → +42 (auto-timed safe jump setup) ** Super Art gain 1200 → 1400; Drive gain 2000 → 3000; Drive Damage on block 4000 → 6000 * {{clr|M|MK High Blade Kick}} ({{clr|M|236MK}}) damage 1100 → 1200; Super Art gain 1200 → 1400; Drive gain 3000 → 3500 * {{clr|H|HK High Blade Kick}} ({{clr|H|236HK}}) Super Art gain 1200 → 1400 * {{clr|OD|OD High Blade Kick}} ({{clr|OD|236KK}}) startup 18f → 17f; combo scaling reduced from 10% extra → 5% extra ** Less pushback when hitting airborne opponents

* {{clr|L|LP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|L|214LP}}) pushback reduced on hit * {{clr|M|MP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|M|214MP}}) pushback reduced on hit; Drive Damage on block 4000 → 6000 * {{clr|H|HP Hashogeki}} ({{clr|H|214HP}}) Drive Damage on block 4000 → 6000 * {{clr|OD|OD Hashogeki}} ({{clr|OD|214PP}}) Drive Damage on block 4000 → 6000 * {{clr|H|Denjin Hashogeki}} ({{clr|H|D.214HP}}) now only comes out when pressing {{clr|H|HP}}; can use regular {{clr|L|LP}}/{{clr|M|MP}} versions while retaining Denjin stock ** Startup 21f → 20f (now combos from {{clr|M|2MK}}); Drive Damage on block 2000 x2 → 3000 x2 ** Recovery (hit/whiff) 18 → 19; KD Advantage +62 → +61 * {{clr|OD|Denjin OD Hashogeki}} ({{clr|OD|D.214PP}}) damage 1000 → 800; Drive Damage on block 4000 → 6000

* {{clr|SA|SA1}} startup 8f → 7f; can now be performed while {{clr|OD|OD Hadoken}} is on-screen ** Expanded combo-only hitbox starting on 3rd active frame (more consistent in combos) * {{clr|SA|SA2}} removed projectile clash hitbox; increased damage on Regular/Denjin Lv.1 and Lv.2 versions ** Normal Lv.1 2600 → 2800; Normal Lv.2 2800 → 2900 ** Denjin Lv.1 3000 → 3200; Denjin Lv.2 3200 → 3300 * {{clr|SA|SA3}} non-cinematic final hit damage 1000 → 2000 (total: 2600 → 3600); hitbox extended upwards from active frame 3~ * {{clr|SA|SA3}}/{{clr|SA|CA}} startup 5f → 2f when canceled from {{clr|H|623HP}} (ensures combo consistency)
=== '''Zangief''' === * Improved Super Meter gain on: ** {{clr|M|5MP}}, {{clr|M|5MK}}, {{clr|M|2MP}}, {{clr|M|2MK}} ** {{clr|M|3MP}}, {{clr|M|6MK}}, {{clr|H|6HP}}, {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|H|3HK}}, {{clr|H|j.8HP}} ** PP/{{clr|OD|PPP}}, 360+P/{{clr|OD|PP}}, j.360+K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, Close 63214K/{{clr|OD|KK}}, Mid/Far 63214K/{{clr|OD|KK}} * Improved Drive Gauge gain on: ** {{clr|H|5[HP]}}, {{clr|M|5MK}}, {{clr|M|2MP}} ** {{clr|M|3MP}}, {{clr|M|6MK}}, {{clr|H|6HP}}, {{clr|H|6HK}}, {{clr|H|3HK}}, {{clr|H|j.8HP}} ** PP, 360+P, Close 63214K * Improved Drive Damage (Block/{{clr|PC|Punish Counter}}) on: ** {{clr|H|5[HP]}}, {{clr|M|5MK}}, {{clr|M|2MP}}, {{clr|M|2MK}} (PC only) ** {{clr|M|6MK}} (PC only), {{clr|H|6HP}}

* {{clr|L|5LK}} less pushback on hit (improves consistency when canceled) * {{clr|M|5MP}} less pushback on hit * {{clr|M|5MK}} damage 800 → 900; hitbox expanded forward ** '''NOTE:''' the hitbox was reverted to its previous version in [[Street_Fighter_6/Version/1.06|Patch 1.06]] only 1 month afterwards * {{clr|M|2MP}} less pushback on hit * {{clr|M|2MK}} Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|P|+2}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+3}} and less pushback (allows link to {{clr|M|3MP}} after close range {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}}) * {{clr|H|5[HP]}} damage 1000 → 1400, armor during active frames expanded upwards on arms * {{clr|H|2HP}} startup 12 → 11, active 8 → 9, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-19}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-20}} ** {{clr|PC|Punish Counter}} puts opponent into limited juggle OTG bounce state; moves forward more on startup * {{clr|H|2HK}} forward hurtbox reduced * {{clr|M|Knee Hammer}} ({{clr|M|6MK}}) damage 600 → 700, recovery 14 → 13, Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|E|0}} → {{sf6-adv|P|+1}}, Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} → {{sf6-adv|M|-3}} ** Pushback on hit reduced; overall, much easier to space for frame advantage, and much stronger out of {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} ** '''NOTE:''' the block advantage was reverted to {{sf6-adv|VM|-4}} in [[Street_Fighter_6/Version/1.07|Patch 1.07]], along with a nerf to its forward hurtbox * {{clr|H|Headbutt}} ({{clr|H|6HP}}) damage 900 → 1000, Hit Advantage {{sf6-adv|VP|+6}} → {{sf6-adv|VP|+7}} (allows important link to {{clr|M|3MP}}) * {{clr|H|Cyclone Wheel Kick}} ({{clr|H|6HK}}) Block Advantage {{sf6-adv|VM|-12}} → {{sf6-adv|VM|-9}}, more pushback, recoils farther on block (much easier to space safely) ** Expanded hurtbox around feet during recovery (easier to whiff punish) * {{clr|H|Flying Headbutt}} ({{clr|H|j.8HP}}) damage 800 → 900 * {{clr|M|Machine Gun Chops}} ({{clr|M|5MP}}~{{clr|M|MP}}) hitbox expanded forward, less pushback on hit (more combo consistency) * {{clr|M|Power Stomps}} ({{clr|M|22MK}}~{{clr|M|MK}}) can now be special canceled

* Double Lariat (PP) damage 1200 → 1400; final hit puts opponent into free juggle state (useful for stun combos) * {{clr|OD|OD Double Lariat}} ({{clr|OD|PPP}}) 1st hit damage 500 → 700 * Borscht Dynamite (j.360+K) can now grab opponents in a free juggle state, and combos when canceled from air-to-air {{clr|H|j.8HP}} ** Hitbox expands to match {{clr|OD|j.360+KK}} in juggles; 20% immediate scaling when comboed into * {{clr|OD|OD Siberian Express}} ({{clr|OD|63214KK}} Far) movement speed increased after absorbing attack * {{clr|H|Tundra Storm}} ({{clr|H|22HK}}) counter hitbox expanded inward, active frames 2 → 3 on successful counter (works more consistently, especially vs. {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}}) ** No longer counters if the opponent is behind Zangief
